title: Duzzit Dishwasher Tablets - 5 In 1 Action (Detergent, Rinse Aid, Salt, Stain Removal & Glass Protection) | Removes Stains & Grease (Lemon, 12 Dishwasher Tablets)
features: POWERFUL 5-IN-1 FORMULA: These Duzzit dishwasher tablets combine detergent, rinse aid, dishwasher salt, glass protection and stain removal for a complete clean. Perfect for daily dishwashing in busy family kitchens.
REMOVES STUBBORN STAINS: Each tablet contains active cleaning agents that target burnt-on food, grease and tea stains. Ideal for washing pots, pans, cutlery and dishes after large family meals.
BUILT-IN DISHWASHER SALT: Helps to soften hard water and prevent limescale build-up inside the machine. Perfect for homes in hard water areas, keeping the dishwasher running efficiently.
RINSE AID FOR SPARKLING RESULTS: These dishwasher tabs include a built-in rinse aid to speed up drying and prevent streaks. Dishes come out shining, even after heavy-duty cleaning cycles.
EASY TO USE TABS: Simply unwrap and place one tablet into the dispenser or cutlery basket. Designed for all standard dishwashers, these compact tablets make washing quick and effortless.
GLASS PROTECTION TECHNOLOGY: Protects delicate glassware from clouding or etching during high-heat washes. Ideal for cleaning wine glasses, tumblers and crystal for that clear, glossy finish.
PROTECTS AND CARES FOR DISHWASHERS: With built-in dishwasher salt and cleaning agents, these tabs help prevent residue build-up, leaving both dishes and the machine spotless.
FRESH LEMON FRAGRANCE: Leaves a clean, uplifting lemon scent inside the dishwasher. Enjoy a fresh aroma every time the door opens, making kitchen chores feel lighter and brighter.
12 PACK VALUE: Each pack contains 12 powerful tablets, providing long-lasting cleaning performance. Great value for everyday use, keeping dishes consistently clean and sparkling.
SUITABLE FOR ALL CYCLES: Works effectively in both short and long wash programmes between 50–65°C. Perfect for everything from light daily washes to deep cleaning cookware.
description: Product Description Duzzit Dishwasher Tablets 5 in 1 formula means that each tablet provides detergent, rinse aid, salt, glass protection and stain removal properties. The powerful performance will wash dishes, cutlery, pots, pans and glasses to make them brilliantly clean. The glass protection will avoid cloudy glasses. After use the dishwasher will have a clean lasting fresh lemon fragrance. Pack contains 72 tablets Ingredients Contains Sodium Silicate, Sodium Percarbonate Contains 15 to 30% Oxygen Based Bleaching Agent, 5-15% Non Ionic Surfacants, <5% Also contains: NTA and salts thereof, EDTA and salts thereof, Enzymes (Protease), Perfume, Limonene, Citral Directions * Remove large food scraps from your dishes and cutlery * Load the dishwasher according to the manufacturers instructions * Remove the protective wrapping from the tablet and place it in the dispenser or in the cutlery basket. 1 tablet is enough whatever the cycle condition * Select the required washing cycle and start the dishwasher * Do not run with the dishwasher short program * Use on a normal washing programme (50-65 degrees) See more
